description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- fix(control): clear the active goal on session rotation by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6114
- Fix session conflict diagnostics and depth-cap baseline / 修复会话冲突诊断与深度上限基线 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6120
- Return an explicit outcome from snapshot conflict recovery / 会话冲突恢复显式返回结果类型 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6124
- Move the persisted-rewrite baseline into agent.Session / 将 rewrite 持久化基线内聚进 Session by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6125
- Migrate diagnostic sidecars through overlong-name reconciliation / 超长名整理时迁移诊断 sidecar by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6126
- ci(release): catch missing stable npm tags without failing in-flight publishes by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6118
- Fix StepFun preset base URLs by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6128
- Fix recovery-copy UX and guard agent writes to session data / 修复冲突副本体验并防护 agent 直写会话数据 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6123
- Honor external edits to heartbeat-tasks.json / 心跳任务文件的外部编辑不再丢失 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6131
- Recover startup session lease retries / 恢复启动会话锁重试 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6134
- Reconcile startup readiness metadata / 对账启动 ready 元数据 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6136
- fix auto approval for compound bash / 修复复合 bash 自动审批 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6137
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.5...desktop-v1.17.6
